message:
🌱 Add thanos: donwsampling: Optimize downsample memory usage  mission (#779)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,82 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "kubevela-1144-feature-applicationdeployment-crd-to-support-application-level-rol",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "kubevela: [Feature] ApplicationDeployment CRD to support application level rollout, traffic, and multi-cluster strategies",
+    "description": "[Feature] ApplicationDeployment CRD to support application level rollout, traffic, and multi-cluster strategies. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current kubevela deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your kubevela version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
helm list -n kubevela 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kubevela installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review kubevela configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant kubevela configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get configmap -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kubevela
```
Currently Vela supports Application CRD which templates the low level resources and exposes high level parameters to users. But that's not enough. It requires a couple of standard techniques to deploy an application in production:

1."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [Feature] ApplicationDeployment CRD to support application…",
+        "description": "ref: https://github.com/oam-dev/kubevela/issues/1144
```yaml
kind: ApplicationDeployment
name: example-app-deploy
spec:
  trafficRules:
    hosts:
      - example-app.example.com
    http:
      - match:
          - uri:
              prefix: "/web"
        weightedTargets:
          - revisionName: example-app-v1
            weight: 50
          - revisionName: example-app-v2
            weight: 50

  appRevisions:
    - # Name of the AppRevision.
      # Each modification to Application would generate a new AppRevision.
      revisionName: example-app-v1

      # Cluster specific workload placement config
      placement:
        - clusterSelector:
  
```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kubevela -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kubevela
kubectl get events -n kubevela --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "[Feature] ApplicationDeployment CRD to support application…" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "ref: https://github.com/oam-dev/kubevela/issues/1144",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "kind: ApplicationDeployment
name: example-app-deploy
spec:
  trafficRules:
    hosts:
      - example-app.example.com
    http:
      - match:
          - uri:
              prefix: "/web"
        weightedTargets:
          - revisionName: example-app-v1
            weight: 50
          - revisionName: example-app-v2
            weight: 50

  appRevisions:
    - # Name of the AppRevision.
      # Each modification to Application would generate a new AppRevision.
      revisionName: example-app-v1

      # Cluster specific workload placement config
      placement:
        - clusterSelector:
            # You can select Clusters by name or labels.
            # If multiple clusters is selected, one will be picked via a unique hashing algorithm.
            labels:
              usage: produ",
+        "kind: Cluster
metadata:
  name: prod-cluster-1
  labels:
    usage: production
spec:
  kubeconfig: ...",
+        "apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
  kind: VirtualService
  spec:
    hosts:
      - example-app.example.com
    http:
      - match:
          - uri:
              prefix: "/web"

        route:
          - destination:
              host: example-app-v1
            weight: 50
          - destination:
              host: example-app-v2
            weight: 50"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "kubevela",
+      "incubating",
+      "app-definition",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "kubevela"
+    ],
+    "targetResourceKinds": [
+      "Deployment",
+      "Ingress",
+      "Statefulset"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "advanced",
+    "issueTypes": [
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "incubating",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/kubevela/kubevela/issues/1144",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/kubevela/kubevela",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/kubevela/kubevela/pull/1193"
+    },
+    "reactions": 4,
+    "comments": 14,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "vela",
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with kubevela installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
+    "scannedAt": "2026-03-13T06:26:44.909Z",

+    "sanitized": true,

@@ -0,0 +1,78 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "thanos-297-donwsampling-optimize-downsample-memory-usage",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "thanos: donwsampling: Optimize downsample memory usage ",
+    "description": "donwsampling: Optimize downsample memory usage . Requested by 9+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current thanos deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your thanos version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nhelm list -n thanos 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working thanos installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review thanos configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant thanos configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get configmap -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=thanos\n```\nDownsample can OOM easily with 16GB.. wonder if we can improve that in any way. \n\nIt uses a lot of memory when downsampling my 2-week block (on top of other mem usage after lot's of compactions maybe). Wonder if that's not some lazy GC issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for donwsampling: Optimize downsample memory usage ",
+        "description": "PTAL\n```yaml\ngsutil du -sh \"gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G/\" \n13.82 GiB   gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n thanos -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos\nkubectl get events -n thanos --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"donwsampling: Optimize downsample memory usage \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the fix PR for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/515\n\nSee the source issue and linked PR for the complete solution details.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "gsutil du -sh \"gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G/\" \n13.82 GiB   gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G",
+        "gsutil du -sh \"gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G/chunks/\"\n12.58 GiB   gs://thanos-beta/01CB8HB76TAETC189K7V77VB8G/chunks",
+        "(pprof) top 5\nShowing nodes accounting for 55.07GB, 62.78% of 87.71GB total\nDropped 356 nodes (cum <= 0.44GB)\nShowing top 5 nodes out of 58\n      flat  flat%   sum%        cum   cum%\n   21.22GB 24.19% 24.19%    21.22GB 24.19%  github.com/improbable-eng/thanos/pkg/compact/downsample.EncodeAggrChunk\n   10.97GB 12.50% 36.70%    10.97GB 12.50%  github.com/improbable-eng/thanos/vendor/github.com/prometheus/tsdb/chunkenc.(*bstream).writeByte\n    8.49GB  9.68% 46.38%    14.14GB 16.12%  github.com/improbable-eng/thanos/vendor/github.com/prometheus/tsdb/chunkenc.(*XORChunk).iterator\n    7.62GB  8.68% 55.06%     7.62GB  8.68%  github.com/improbable-eng/thanos/vendor/github.com/prometheus/tsdb/chunkenc.NewXORChunk\n    6.77GB  7.72% 62.78%     6.77GB  7.72%  github.com/improbable-eng/thanos/vendor/git"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "thanos",
+      "incubating",

+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/issues/297",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/thanos-io/thanos/pull/515"
+    },
+    "reactions": 9,

+  },
+  "prerequisites": {

+      "thanos"
+    ],
